SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.tests

Class MeteoMessageFactoryTest

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.tests.MeteoMessageFactoryTest
public class MeteoMessageFactoryTest extends Object
Unit tests for the Phase B.4 factory classes and filter helpers: WindMessageFactory, MeteoAlertMessageFactory, MeteoFilters, and MeteoProperties (CDC §3.4).

What is being tested:

  • WindMessageFactory.build sets the expected property keys and values.
  • MeteoAlertMessageFactory.build sets the expected property keys and values.
  • MeteoFilters.windWithinDistance matches a wind message inside the radius and rejects one beyond it.
  • MeteoFilters.anyAlert accepts any alert message and rejects wind messages.
  • MeteoFilters.anyWind accepts any wind message and rejects alert messages.
Author:
Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa

    Constructors

    Description

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    testAlertMessageFactoryNullAlertThrows()
    MeteoAlertMessageFactory.build(java.lang.String, fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.MeteoAlertI) rejette un alert null.
    void
    testAlertMessageFactoryNullOfficeIdThrows()
    MeteoAlertMessageFactory.build(java.lang.String, fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.MeteoAlertI) rejette un officeId null.
    void
    testAlertMessageFactoryProperties()
    MeteoAlertMessageFactory.build(java.lang.String, fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.MeteoAlertI) positionne TYPE, OFFICE_ID, LEVEL, ALERT_TYPE, PAYLOAD.
    void
    testAnyAlertMatchesAlertMessage()
    MeteoFilters.anyAlert() accepte tout message d'alerte.
    void
    testAnyAlertMatchesDifferentAlertTypes()
    MeteoFilters.anyAlert() accepte les alertes de tous les AlertType.
    void
    testAnyAlertRejectsWindMessage()
    MeteoFilters.anyAlert() rejette les messages vent.
    void
    testAnyWindMatchesWindMessage()
    MeteoFilters.anyWind() accepte tout message vent.
    void
    testAnyWindRejectsAlertMessage()
    MeteoFilters.anyWind() rejette les messages d'alerte.
    void
    testWindMessageFactoryNullStationIdThrows()
    WindMessageFactory.build(java.lang.String, fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.WindDataI) rejette un stationId null.
    void
    testWindMessageFactoryNullWindThrows()
    WindMessageFactory.build(java.lang.String, fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.WindDataI) rejette un wind null.
    void
    testWindMessageFactoryPayload()
    WindMessageFactory.build(java.lang.String, fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.WindDataI) stocke le WindDataI comme payload du message.
    void
    testWindMessageFactoryProperties()
    WindMessageFactory.build(java.lang.String, fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.WindDataI) positionne TYPE, STATION_ID, FORCE, X, Y, PAYLOAD.
    void
    testWindWithinDistanceMatchesInsideRadius()
    MeteoFilters.windWithinDistance(fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.PositionI, double) accepte un message vent dans le rayon donné.
    void
    testWindWithinDistanceRejectsAlertMessage()
    MeteoFilters.windWithinDistance(fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.PositionI, double) rejette un message d'alerte (mauvais type).
    void
    testWindWithinDistanceRejectsBeyondRadius()
    MeteoFilters.windWithinDistance(fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.PositionI, double) rejette un message vent au-delà du rayon.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      WindMessageFactory.build(java.lang.String, fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.WindDataI) positionne TYPE, STATION_ID, FORCE, X, Y, PAYLOAD.

    • testWindMessageFactoryPayload

      public void testWindMessageFactoryPayload()
      WindMessageFactory.build(java.lang.String, fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.meteo.WindDataI) stocke le WindDataI comme payload du message.
